items.title: 1 Oversold Stock Primed to Rebound and 2 That Underwhelm
items.description: The past year hasn't been kind to the stocks featured in this article. Each has tumbled to their lowest points in 12 months, leaving investors to decide whether they're witnessing fire sales or falling knives.
